description: Production migration runbook for MonthlyRevenue releaseDate schema change

runbookSteps.label: Pre-migration system health check
runbookSteps.description: Verify production system is healthy. Check DB connectivity, application health endpoints, and error rates.

runbookSteps.label: Create production backup
runbookSteps.description: Execute backup per p22production_backup_restore_plan.json. SQLite: file copy with sha256 checksum.

runbookSteps.label: Verify backup checksum
runbookSteps.description: Compute sha256 of backup file. Record checksum in operations log.

runbookSteps.label: Go/No-Go checkpoint #1 — before maintenance window
runbookSteps.description: CTO/CEO confirms: backup verified, system healthy, team ready, rollback plan accessible.

runbookSteps.label: Enable maintenance mode
runbookSteps.command: [PLACEHOLDER — requires P23 approval: enable maintenance mode / health check returns 503]

runbookSteps.label: Apply production migration
runbookSteps.description: Run prisma migrate deploy to apply releaseDate schema changes. Fixture DB dry-run completed in P18 (passCount verified).
runbookSteps.command: [PLACEHOLDER — requires P23 approval: npx prisma migrate deploy]

runbookSteps.label: Backfill releaseDate values
runbookSteps.description: Run backfill to populate releaseDate for existing MonthlyRevenue rows. Backfill logic validated in P18 fixture DB.

runbookSteps.label: Go/No-Go checkpoint #2 — after migration and backfill
runbookSteps.description: CTO/CEO confirms: migration applied without error, backfill completed, ready for validation.

runbookSteps.label: Run query gate validation
runbookSteps.description: Validate releaseDate <= asOfDate for all sampled rows. Must be 0 violations. Gate verified in P17 and P18.
runbookSteps.validationQuery: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM MonthlyRevenue WHERE releaseDate > asOfDate — must be 0

runbookSteps.label: Run post-migration validation checklist
runbookSteps.description: Execute all items in p22production_monitoring_checklist.json. All mandatory items must pass.
runbookSteps.onFailure: Trigger rollback runbook if any mandatory item fails

runbookSteps.label: Go/No-Go checkpoint #3 — before resuming production traffic
runbookSteps.description: CTO/CEO reviews all validation results. Must confirm all mandatory items pass before traffic resumes.

runbookSteps.label: Resume production traffic
runbookSteps.description: Disable maintenance mode after successful validation.
runbookSteps.command: [PLACEHOLDER — requires P23 approval: disable maintenance mode]

runbookSteps.label: Post-migration monitoring (T+0 to T+30min)
runbookSteps.description: Monitor releaseDate null rate, query gate compliance, and application error rate for 30 minutes.

runbookSteps.label: Rollback (conditional — if any checkpoint fails)
runbookSteps.description: Execute rollback per p22production_backup_restore_plan.json restoreMethod. Triggered only on failure.
runbookSteps.command: [PLACEHOLDER — requires P23 approval: restore from backup]
runbookSteps.condition: Only if one or more go/no-go checkpoints (R04, R08, R11) fail, or if validation (R09, R10) fail

nonGoals: P22 does NOT execute any runbook step in this phase
All production commands are PLACEHOLDER requiring explicit P23 approval token
P23 review does not auto-execute migration — requires separate execution approval
